step_rationale: Post-MI remodeling mediator; acts on cardiac repair rather than the acute atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: Thrombospondin-2 regulates post-infarction myocardial remodeling and fibrosis, a secondary repair process distinct from atherothrombosis.

references.title: Proteogenomic Analysis of Coronary Artery Calcification in Human Populations.
Prioritizing Candidates of Post-Myocardial Infarction Heart Failure Using Plasma Proteomics and Single-Cell Transcriptomics.
